description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black metal body and a robust, angular design. The rifle features a skeletonized stock with a visible support strut and a dark, possibly polymer or metal, buttplate. The handguard and receiver are integrated, with a prominent carrying handle and iron sights mounted on top. The magazine is a detachable box type, extending downward at an angle, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The fore-end and stock have reddish-brown accents, likely wood or polymer, adding a distinct visual contrast. The barrel is standard length and ends with a simple muzzle, lacking any visible suppressor or flash hider.
description: A tactical rifle with a black metal body, skeletonized stock, detachable box magazine, and reddish-brown accent panels.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the barrel's end and a narrow profile with the stock and handguard aligned.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length, skeletonized stock, carrying handle, iron sights, and the detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel, with the pistol grip and magazine barely visible.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the reddish-brown fore-end and stock, as well as the overall angular design and magazine placement.
